overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The journey begins under a highway overpass with neon-lit commercial buildings, transitions through an open parking area, and proceeds into a narrow industrial service corridor between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass transitioning to commercial street

events.description: turns left from main street into parking area behind the curved beige building

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass and navigating around parked vehicles before turning into an open parking lot

notable_agents.action: dark sedan with headlights on driving under the overpass

entered.detail: large orange ventilation pipe running along the overpass structure above the street
green concrete wall with colorful abstract graffiti art
red Thornton pickup truck parked on the right side of the street
illuminated yellow signage for Masala Studios on the building facade
rounded beige art deco style parking garage with horizontal window slits

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a highway overpass with industrial pipes and graffiti-covered walls. The camera moves past a red pickup truck and turns left into an open parking area, with the Masala Studios building visible in the background. A dark sedan passes by with headlights on in the dim underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot behind commercial buildings

events.description: approaches construction barriers and the dark entrance to a narrow service corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty parking lot toward a narrow passage between buildings

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat standing near white plastic barriers

entered.detail: sleek blue sports car parked in the center of the lot
white plastic construction barriers with warning signage blocking off an area
dark narrow entrance to a covered service corridor between concrete buildings

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open asphalt parking lot with a blue sports car parked in the center. The beige curved building now appears on the left while the Masala Studios sign remains visible on the right. The camera approaches construction barriers where a worker stands near the entrance to a narrow alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial service corridor with utility infrastructure

events.description: enters the narrow covered alleyway from the open parking lot, lighting becomes significantly dimmer

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit industrial corridor between tall concrete walls with pipes and scaffolding

entered.detail: large metal ventilation pipes running vertically along the right wall
rusty metal scaffolding structure against the right wall with platforms
metal bridge connecting the two buildings overhead with railings
electrical utility panels and conduits mounted on the left concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, covered service corridor between high concrete walls. Industrial pipes and scaffolding line the right side while electrical utilities run along the left. The space is dimly lit with light filtering through gaps above, creating a stark contrast with the bright exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: service lane with parked mobile homes and overhead bridge structures

agents.ego_description: continuing through the wider service area with mobile homes parked along the left side

entered.detail: silver mobile homes and trailers parked along the left side of the lane
multiple levels of metal walkways and bridges connecting buildings overhead
large ventilation units and satellite dishes visible on building roofs ahead

segments.scene_description: The corridor widens slightly into a service lane with mobile homes parked along the left side. Multiple overhead bridges span between buildings above, and industrial HVAC equipment is visible on the rooftops ahead. The lighting becomes brighter as the space opens up toward the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty urban underpass through an open parking lot and into a confined industrial corridor. It begins beneath a highway overpass amidst graffiti-covered walls and industrial pipes, passing a red pickup truck and a dark sedan before turning left into an open asphalt area. As the camera moves across the lot past a blue sports car and the Masala Studios building, the scene shifts toward construction barriers where a worker stands at the mouth of a narrow alleyway. The perspective then transitions into a dimly lit, covered service corridor flanked by high concrete walls, scaffolding, and electrical utilities. Finally, the space opens into a wider service lane lined with mobile homes and spanned by overhead bridges, with the lighting brightening as the camera moves toward rooftop HVAC equipment.
